quote: We are very happy to share our experience with our babysitter, Vaidehi. She has been caring for our two children, Kitty and Luca, in our home, and she has been absolutely wonderful. She is kind, patient, and very good at what she does, always engaging the kids in fun and meaningful activities. We truly appreciate her dedication, warmth, and positive energy, and we would highly recommend Vaidehi to any family looking for a trustworthy and loving babysitter.
author: Merin
relation: Mum of Luca (1.5 yrs) · Newbridge, Kildare

quote: Vaidehi has been an absolute gem with our little ones, Kitty and Luca. Her patience and warmth shine through every day — the kids are always happy and engaged. She brings such positive energy into our home, and we could not recommend her more highly to any family looking for a caring and trustworthy babysitter.
author: Adarsh
relation: Dad of Kitty (3.5 yrs)· Newbridge, Kildare

quote: Vaidehi is a caring and dependable childminder. She provides a warm, safe environment and takes great care of my son. My son Niketh has been very happy with her, and I highly recommend her to other parents.
author: Sruthy
relation: Mum of Niketh (1 yr) · Naas, Kildare
